ground_truth_relationships.evidence: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta continues to face scrutiny
Elon Musk's erratic management of Twitter
Sundar Pichai's Google has made genuine efforts
Tim Cook's Apple merely hides behind privacy marketing
Senator Amy Klobuchar, who chairs the Antitrust Subcommittee
Lina Khan's aggressive approach at the FTC
Margrethe Vestager's team at the European Commission
Satya Nadella's Microsoft emerge as the most compliant
Sam Altman's OpenAI would become Washington's newest darling

expected_metrics.notes: Opinion piece with speculative language. Most relationships are clear works_for/owns, but speculative statements ('might see', 'could inspire', 'may signal') should NOT generate low-confidence relationship extractions. System must distinguish between factual leadership roles and speculative future predictions.

notes: AMBIGUOUS EXAMPLE: Tests system's ability to extract factual relationships from opinion context while ignoring speculative/conditional statements. Many sentences use 'might', 'could', 'perhaps' which should NOT generate relationships. Only extract explicit current relationships.
